overall.description: Aerial drone footage from the video game Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the Santo Domingo industrial district at golden hour. The camera smoothly orbits a distinctive yellow industrial tower marked '04' with red neon signage before flying past it to reveal an expansive urban landscape with the Biotechnica building, elevated highways, and distant mountains illuminated by the low sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic industrial tower with neon warning signage

agents.ego_description: flying drone circling the yellow industrial tower to survey the structure and surrounding area

entered.detail: tall yellow industrial tower with large white '04' numbering and red neon 'NO ENTRY' warning signs
multi-level highway interchange winding through the industrial district below
cluster of industrial structures and smoke stacks surrounding the main tower
mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the city limits

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view focused on a massive yellow industrial tower marked with '04' and red neon 'NO ENTRY' signage. The drone camera smoothly orbits the structure, revealing intricate geometric facade patterns and elevated highways winding below. Warm golden hour light casts long shadows across the industrial landscape, with distant mountains visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial cityscape with corporate buildings and highway interchanges

events.description: camera flies past the yellow tower revealing the open cityscape and Biotechnica building

agents.ego_description: flying forward past the tower to survey the broader industrial district and highway systems

entered.detail: large black industrial building with vertical white 'BIO-TECHNICA' signage
extensive industrial sprawl with storage tanks and processing facilities

segments.scene_description: The drone transitions from the close-up tower view to a sweeping vista of the Santo Domingo industrial district. The black Biotechnica building with its vertical white signage becomes the new focal point as the yellow tower recedes to the left. Elevated highways stretch into the distance toward the mountains, with sparse traffic visible on the roads below.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive industrial wasteland with smoke stacks and storage facilities

events.description: flying vehicle passes through the airspace heading toward the distant city center

agents.ego_description: continuing forward over the industrial sprawl toward the setting sun on the horizon

notable_agents.action: flying vehicle moving across the sky above the industrial complex toward the city

entered.detail: industrial chimneys emitting smoke plumes into the atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the drone flying over a sprawling industrial wasteland with smoke stacks and storage facilities. The Biotechnica building passes out of view to the left as the camera continues toward the bright sun on the horizon. A flying vehicle briefly crosses the frame, heading toward the distant city center, while the landscape below reveals extensive industrial infrastructure and winding roads.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial movement that begins with a focused orbit of a singular industrial landmark and expands into a sweeping vista of a sprawling urban wasteland. It begins by circling a massive yellow industrial tower marked with red neon signage, capturing the intricate geometric patterns of the facade against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the camera pulls away, the tower recedes to the left to reveal the black Biotechnica building and a network of elevated highways stretching toward the horizon under warm golden hour light. The scene then shifts further across the industrial district, passing the Biotechnica building to fly over smoke stacks and storage facilities. Finally, the camera glides toward the bright sun on the horizon as a flying vehicle crosses the frame, leaving the dense infrastructure behind for the open expanse of the city center.
